items.headline: Los Angeles Kings Colorado Avalanche Game 2 recap April 21 2026
items.description: DENVER -- Nicolas Roy scored at 7:44 of overtime, and the Colorado Avalanche rallied to defeat the Los Angeles Kings 2-1 in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round at Ball Arena on Tuesday.

items.headline: Utah Mammoth bringing momentum home after first Stanley Cup Playoff win
items.description:
LAS VEGAS -- All right, Utah. Get ready to get loud.
The Utah Mammoth earned their first Stanley Cup Playoff victory Tuesday when they defeated the Vegas Golden Knights 3-2 at T-Mobile Arena in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round.
And so, they will host their first home

items.headline: Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen laments miscue for Buffalo Sabres in Game 2
items.description:
BUFFALO -- Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen didn’t shy away from the blame.
The Buffalo Sabres goalie put it on himself for not properly reading the puck when Boston Bruins forward Morgan Geekie flipped it on his backhand from center ice into the Buffalo zone.
It took a bounce in front of Luukkonen

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Utah Mammoth Vegas Golden Knights game 2 recap April 21 2026
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- Logan Cooley scored the go-ahead goal late in the third period to help the Utah Mammoth win their first Stanley Cup Playoff game in franchise history with a 3-2 victory against the Vegas Golden Knights in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round at T-Mobile Arena

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning even series with wild and physical Game 2 victory
items.description:
TAMPA -- If the rest of the Eastern Conference First Round series between the Tampa Bay Lightning and Montreal Canadiens is like Game 2 on Tuesday, fans in each city are in for a treat.
And cardiologists in each city are in for a lot of business.

items.headline: Celebrities sports stars attend NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs
items.description:
The puck has dropped on the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs. Celebrities from the sports and entertainment worlds are taking in all the action. Check out what famous faces have been spotted in the stands.
Eastern Conference First Round
Up in Buffalo, “One Tree Hill” actor Chad Michael Murray lived it

items.headline: Jeremy Swayman displays leadership in Game 2 win for Boston
items.description: BUFFALO -- For more than 40 minutes in Game 1, the Buffalo Sabres had serenaded Jeremy Swayman with taunting chants of his name. And yet, he had stopped every puck. The faithful, though, seemed to be rewarded when the Sabres came back in the third period and so, it wasn’t

items.headline: Montreal Canadiens Tampa Bay Lightning Game 2 recap April 21 2026
items.description: TAMPA -- J.J. Moser scored at 12:48 of overtime to give the Tampa Bay Lightning a 3-2 win against the Montreal Canadiens in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Benchmark International Arena on Tuesday.

items.headline: Boston Bruins Buffalo Sabres Game 2 recap April 21 2026
items.description: BUFFALO -- Viktor Arvidsson scored twice for the Boston Bruins, who held off another late third period rally to defeat the Buffalo Sabres 4-2 in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round at KeyBank Center on Tuesday.

items.headline: Senators have grit to rally like 1938 Black Hawks against Hurricanes in playoffs
items.description: Legendary hockey reporter Stan Fischler writes a weekly scrapbook for NHL.com. "The Hockey Maven" shares his humor and insight with readers each Wednesday. With the Stanley Cup Playoffs in full swing, this week focuses on the fascinating Eastern Conference First Round between the Carolina Hurricanes and Ottawa Senators.

items.headline: Victor Hedman injury status update April 21 2026
items.description:
TAMPA -- Victor Hedman could return to the Tampa Bay Lightning in the Stanley Cup Playoffs, coach Jon Cooper said Tuesday, but it’s unlikely he will do so in the Eastern Conference First Round.
The defenseman and Lightning captain hasn't played since leaving during the first period of a 6-2

items.headline: Bills Josh Allen Buffalo Sabres pregame drum
items.description:
Josh Allen might not have a voice after that one.
The Buffalo Bills quarterback was at KeyBank Center on Tuesday for Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round between the Buffalo Sabres and Boston Bruins, banging the drum pregame to get the fans on their feet.

items.headline: New Jersey Devils surprise GM Sunny Mehta with Starter jacket
items.description:
The New Jersey Devils know how to make a fashion statement and so does their new general manager.
On Tuesday, the team surprised Mehta with the same Devils Starter jacket he had as a kid before his introductory press conference at Prudential Center.
After being hired by the Devils on

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks gain confidence entering Game 2 against Oilers
items.description: EDMONTON -- The Anaheim Ducks got their feet wet in the first Stanley Cup Playoff game for over half the roster and are ready to dive in against the Edmonton Oilers in the Western Conference First Round.​
